outlook_cert_pem.label: Azure app certificate PEM contents (cert + private key; alternative to client secret)

outlook_cert_password.label: Passphrase for the certificate PEM (leave empty if unencrypted)

allowed_senders.label: Allowed senders (comma-separated; supports glob wildcards e.g. *@mycompany.com; empty blocks all)

poll_top.label: Max unread messages fetched per poll (<=50)
